name: Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter with 2 cups of flour and 1 cup of confectioner's sugar. With floured hands, pat the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the eggs, 2 cups of sugar, baking powder, remaining flour, and lemon juice until smooth. Pour this batter over the cooled crust. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until the filling is set and the squares are golden brown.
3. Allow the squares to cool completely in the pan before sprinkling with additional powdered sugar. Once removed from the pan, cut into squares.
